name: Newbury Street II Acquisition Corp
business: Newbury Street II Acquisition Corp is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a business combination. It has no operating revenues and has not selected any business combination target as of the report date.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We must complete our initial Business Combination by (i) November 4, 2026, the end of our Combination Period, which is 24 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering, (ii) such earlier liquidation date as our Board may approve or (iii) such later date as our shareholders may approve pursuant to the Amended and Restated Articles.
